title: gardenia thailandica
intro: Gardenia thailandica, also known as the Thai gardenia or Kra Chuea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Thailand. It has been used in traditional Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Gardenia thailandica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Gardenia thailandica include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to promote relaxation and skin health.
